meaning: adj.无机会的 无可能性的,{板}(外场员) 无接球机会的
examples: Hampshire had begun the day on 194-3 and Crawley moved to a chanceless hundred off 189 balls, with 15 fours.
More rain cut the target to 175 off 29 overs but Pietersen's chanceless knock saw Hants home with four balls left.
It was a chanceless exhibition of orthodox batting by Ramprakash, who had arrived at the crease in the second over of the day after Yorkshire had declared overnight with a first innings lead of 210.
